aeo_readiness.summary: GVEC Solar Services has a strong foundation but lacks conversational content and structured data to be cited by AI assistants like ChatGPT or Claude.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common solar panel and installation questions.
Create detailed how-to guides for solar panel installation and maintenance.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate contact information.
critical_issues: No recent posts about promotions or community events.
Q&A section is inactive and lacks engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for solar installation guides
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI assistant citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to solar installation costs and process.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema with solar energy FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the expert by publishing detailed guides on solar energy and AI-optimized content.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQPage and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI citations.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement structured data and create conversational content to boost AI visibility and authority.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; acting now prevents losing market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads with Our AEO Strategy
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
